highlights.description: Google Sheets support with 5 new tools for reading spreadsheets

added.description: `skills/sheets`: New Google Sheets skill with 5 tools
`get_spreadsheet_metadata` tool: Get spreadsheet metadata (title, sheet count, locale, time zone)
`list_sheets` tool: List all sheets with properties (rows, columns, frozen)
`get_sheet_values` tool: Get cell values from a specific range with typed output
`get_sheet_data` tool: Get all data from a specific sheet
`get_multiple_ranges` tool: Batch get values from multiple ranges
CLI: `get-spreadsheet-metadata`, `list-sheets`, `get-sheet-values`, `get-sheet-data` commands
Auth: Add `spreadsheets.readonly` OAuth scope

changed.description: Upgrade `gogoogle` from v0.10.0 to v0.11.0 for sheetsutil/v4 support

documentation.description: Update README, CLI reference, and tools overview for Sheets

highlights.description: Composable architecture built on omniskill framework
Google Docs support with 4 new tools

added.description: `skills/docs`: Google Docs skill with 4 tools
`get_document_metadata` tool: Get document metadata (title, word count)
`get_document_content` tool: Get structured content with images and tables
`get_document_text` tool: Get all text as plain text
`get_document_paragraphs` tool: Get text by paragraphs
Cobra CLI with subcommands and direct tool invocation
Vault-backed credentials via omnitoken (1Password, Bitwarden)

changed.description: CLI flags changed from `-flag` to `--flag` style

highlights.description: Initial release: Read-only MCP server for Google Slides presentations

added.description: `get_presentation` tool: retrieve presentation metadata (title, slide count, locale, revision)
`list_slides` tool: enumerate slides with titles and element counts
`get_slide` tool: get content and elements for a specific slide by index or object ID
`get_slide_notes` tool: get speaker notes for a specific slide
`get_presentation_content` tool: aggregate all slides' text and images in one call
Google service account authentication via `-credentials` flag
goauth CredentialsSet authentication via `-goauth-credentials-file` and `-goauth-credentials-account` flags

documentation.description: README with installation, authentication setup, and Claude Desktop configuration

infrastructure.description: GitHub Actions CI workflow for build and test
Dependabot configuration for Go modules and Actions
